description: Add filling instructions/guidelines (tata cara pengisian) to the health test form portal page and modal form so users don't make mistakes when filling out the form.
steps: In renderPortalTestKesehatan(), enhance the existing info box to include step-by-step filling guide explaining the process (test dijadwalkan HRD, isi form sesuai petunjuk, bagian Kesimpulan diisi dokter pemeriksa).

In modalFormTestKesehatan(), add inline helper text under each section header with guidance: Section A (height in cm, weight in kg, BMI auto-calculates), Section B (centang penyakit yang pernah/sedang diderita), Section C (tekanan darah format, nadi normal 60-100bpm, suhu 36-37.5C, penglihatan format 6/6 atau 20/20), Section D (opsional, isi jika sudah ada hasil lab), Section E (jawab sesuai kondisi saat ini), Section F (jawab jujur untuk rekomendasi yang tepat), Section G (HANYA diisi dokter/pemeriksa).
acceptance_criteria: Portal page shows a clear step-by-step guide for users
Form modal has inline helper text under each section header
Helper text uses subtle styling (light colors, small text) that doesn't overwhelm the form
Section G clearly states it is only for dokter/pemeriksa
verification: Grep for 'Tata Cara Pengisian' or 'Petunjuk' in the file
Grep for helper text markers in each section
